source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/라우터 (Archer C64)/10. Test Lab ISO 17025 Certificate/ISO_IEC 17025_Test laboratory_BACL.pdf

document.title: ISO/IEC 17025 认可证书 No. CNAS L2408
document.documentType: ISO/IEC 17025 test laboratory accreditation certificate scope excerpt

sourceSummary.oneLine: Chunk lists CNAS L2408 ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation-scope entries for household appliance safety testing standards and clause-level exclusions.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory evidence that the laboratory accreditation scope includes specific IEC, EN, AS/NZS, GSO, and GB household appliance safety test methods, with defined exceptions and effective dates.
keyPoints: The certificate excerpt repeatedly identifies ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation certificate No. CNAS L2408 and states the Chinese accreditation scope is definitive.
Scope entries cover grills/toasters, shavers/hair clippers, projectors, floor treatment and wet scrubbing machines, and oral hygiene appliances.
Most listed scope entries are effective 2023-04-06; AS/NZS 60335.2.10:2022 floor-treatment entries are effective 2023-09-18.

Several accredited clauses include limitations, including moisture resistance IP exclusions, abnormal operation clause 19.11.4 exclusion, mechanical strength abrasion-resistance exclusion, construction/software/UV-C exclusions, conductor-flexing exclusion, toxicity-test exclusion, and annex exclusions.

entities.name: CNAS L2408
entities.evidence: Header states: ISO/IEC 17025 认可证书 No. CNAS L2408.

entities.name: CNAS
entities.evidence: The excerpt identifies an ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation certificate with No. CNAS L2408.

entities.name: Household and similar electrical appliances
entities.evidence: Multiple scope entries are titled Household and similar electrical appliances - Safety - Particular requirements.

entities.name: Shavers, hair clippers and similar appliances
entities.evidence: Test object 17 is listed as Shavers, hair clippers and similar appliances.

entities.name: Projecter
entities.evidence: Test object 18 is listed as Projecter with projector safety standards.

entities.name: Floor treatment machines and wet scrubbing machines
entities.evidence: Test object 19 is listed as Floor treatment machines and wet scrubbing machines.

entities.name: Oral hygiene appliances
entities.evidence: Test object 20 is listed as Oral hygiene appliances.

concepts.name: ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation scope
concepts.evidence: Each page header states ISO/IEC 17025 认可证书 No. CNAS L2408 and presents Test Object, Item/Parameter, Standard or Method, Note, and Effective Date columns.

concepts.name: Moisture resistance testing limitations
concepts.evidence: Clause 15 entries exclude IPX1, X2, X8, X9 water protection and limit IPX3/IPX4 to pendulum tube testing with a 1 meter radius.

concepts.name: Software evaluation excluded from construction scope
concepts.evidence: Clause 22 Construction notes exclude 22.46 Software evaluation among other construction-related tests.

concepts.name: Radiation, toxicity and similar hazards limitation
concepts.evidence: Clause 32 Radiation, toxicity and similar hazards entries state Except for: toxicity test.

concepts.name: Annex exclusions
concepts.evidence: Annexes entries exclude Annex A, Annex F, Annex H, Annex J, Annex M, Annex R, Annex T, and Annex U for several standards, while GB annex entries exclude A, F, H, J, M, and R.

evidence.claim: The document chunk is from ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation certificate No. CNAS L2408.
evidence.evidenceText: ISO/IEC 17025 认可证书 No. CNAS L2408; The scope of the accreditation in Chinese remains the definitive version.

evidence.claim: The accreditation scope includes safety testing for grills, toasters, and similar portable cooking appliances under IEC, GSO, EN, AS/NZS, and GB versions of IEC/GB 60335-2-9/4706.14.
evidence.evidenceText: Household and similar electrical appliances - Safety-Particular requirements for grills, toasters and similar portable cookingappliances IEC 60335-2-9:2019, GSO IEC 60335-2-9:2008, EN 60335-2-9..., AS/NZS 60335.2.9:2020, GB 4706.14-2008.

evidence.claim: For grills/toasters, clause 32 radiation, toxicity and similar hazards excludes toxicity testing.
evidence.evidenceText: Radiation,toxicity and similar hazards ... IEC 60335-2-9:2019 32 Except for: toxicity test; similar entries for GSO, EN, AS/NZS and GB.

evidence.claim: For grills/toasters, annex testing excludes specified annexes, and the GB standard has a shorter annex exclusion list.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC/GSO/EN/AS/NZS 60335-2-9 Annexes: Except for Annex A, Annex F, Annex H, Annex J, Annex M, Annex R, Annex T, Annex U; GB 4706.14-2008 Annexes excludes Annex A, F, H, J, M, R.

evidence.claim: The scope includes safety testing for shavers, hair clippers, and similar appliances under IEC 60335-2-8 and aligned GSO, EN, AS/NZS, and GB standards.
evidence.evidenceText: Shavers, hair clippers and similar appliances entries list IEC 60335-2-8:2012+A1:2015+A2:2018, GSO IEC 60335-2-8:2013, EN 60335-2-8:2015+A1:2016, AS/NZS 60335.2.8:2013+A1:2017+A2:2019, and GB 4706.9-2008.

evidence.claim: For shavers and hair clippers, moisture resistance clause 15 is limited by IP rating and test setup exclusions.
evidence.evidenceText: Clause 15 Moisture resistance notes: Except for 15.1 IPX1, X2, X8, X9 Protection against water; 15.3 appliance size larger than 100cm x 100cm x 100cm; IPX3 and IPX4 only measure the pendulum tube test with a radius of 1 meter.

evidence.claim: For shavers and hair clippers, abnormal operation clause 19 excludes subclause 19.11.4.
evidence.evidenceText: Abnormal operation entries for IEC/GSO/EN/AS/NZS/GB clause 19 state: Except for: 19.11.4.

evidence.claim: For shavers and hair clippers, construction clause 22 excludes multiple specialized tests including software evaluation and UV-C material testing.
evidence.evidenceText: Construction clause 22 notes exclude 22.11 finger nail test, 22.16 Automatic cord reels, 22.32 Oxygen bomb, 22.46 Software evaluation, 22.47 Water pressure test, 22.48 backsiphonage, and 22.57 UV-C material testing.

evidence.claim: The scope includes projector and similar appliance testing under AS/NZS 60335.2.56:2006+A1:2009+A2:2015 and GB 4706.43-2005.
evidence.evidenceText: Safety of household and similar electrical appliances Particular requirements for projectors and similar appliances AS/NZS 60335.2.56:2006+A1:2009+A2:2015 and GB 4706.43-2005.

evidence.claim: Projector scope entries include standard household appliance safety parameters such as marking, live-part access protection, power input/current, heating, leakage current, transient overvoltages, moisture resistance, abnormal operation, mechanical strength, construction, internal wiring, earthing, clearances, heat/fire resistance, radiation/toxicity, and annexes.
evidence.evidenceText: Projecter entries list items 1 through 23, including Marking and instructions, Protection against access to live parts, Power input and current, Heating, Moisture resistance, Abnormal operation, Mechanical strength, Construction, Internal wiring, and Annexes.

evidence.claim: The scope includes floor treatment machines and wet scrubbing machines under IEC 60335-2-10, GSO IEC 60335-2-10, EN 60335-2-10, AS/NZS 60335.2.10, and GB 4706.57.
evidence.evidenceText: Floor treatment machines and wet scrubbing machines entries list IEC 60335-2-10:2002+A1:2008 and IEC 60335-2-10:2021, GSO IEC 60335-2-10:2009, EN 60335-2-10:2003+A1:2008, AS/NZS 60335.2.10:2006+A1:2009; AS/NZS 60335.2.10:2022, and GB 4706.57-2008.

evidence.claim: For floor treatment and wet scrubbing machines, AS/NZS 60335.2.10:2022 entries are effective 2023-09-18 while other listed standards are generally effective 2023-04-06.
evidence.evidenceText: AS/NZS 60335.2.10:2006+A1:2009; AS/NZS 60335.2.10:2022 entries show Effective Date 2023-09-18; IEC, GSO, EN and GB entries show 2023-04-06.

evidence.claim: The scope includes oral hygiene appliances under IEC 60335-2-52, GSO IEC 60335-2-52, EN 60335-2-52, AS/NZS 60335.2.52, and GB 4706.59.
For oral hygiene appliances, clause 22 Construction excludes software evaluation, UV-C material testing, and several mechanical or pressure-related tests.
evidence.evidenceText: Construction notes for clause 22 exclude 22.11 finger nail test, 22.16 Automatic cord reels, 22.32 Oxygen bomb, 22.46 Software evaluation, 22.47 Water pressure test, 22.48 backsiphonage, and 22.57 UV-C material testing.

evidence.claim: Across listed appliance scopes, internal wiring clause 23 excludes conductor flexing.
evidence.evidenceText: Internal wiring entries state Except for: 23.3 conductor flexing for shavers, floor treatment machines, and oral hygiene appliances.

evidence.claim: Across listed appliance scopes, provision for earthing clause 27 includes an exclusion for coating thickness under 27.4 in several appliance categories.
evidence.evidenceText: Provision for earthing entries state Exept for: 27.4 the thickness of the coating for grills/toasters, shavers/hair clippers, projectors, and oral hygiene appliances.

reviewFlags.reason: Chunk is an excerpt of a larger accreditation scope table; document-level issue date, laboratory legal name, and full certificate validity are not visible in this chunk.
The source metadata authoritySignal says FDA, but this chunk only supports CNAS/ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation-scope facts.

OCR contains spelling and formatting errors such as Exept, Projecter, cookingappliances, similarappliances, and possible standard-reference anomaly for oral hygiene appliances listing IEC 60335-2-10:2021 alongside IEC 60335-2-52.
